name: Plum Chutney #1
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Granny Smith Apple (peeled, cored, and quartered)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pit and quarter the plums.
2. Peel, core, and quarter the apples.
3. Combine all ingredients in a large Dutch oven; bring to a boil.
4. Cook uncovered over medium heat for 2 hours or until thickened, stirring occasionally.
5. Quickly spoon chutney into hot sterilized jars, leaving 1/4 inch head-space.
6. Cover with metal lids and screw bands tight.
7. Process the jars in a boiling-water bath for 10 minutes.
--- Southern Living magazine
